log_entries.thought_preview: The sample overview confirms this is a PE executable (56KB) tagged as a 'spreader' with an overlay. It's packed with Mpress. Now I need to get all IOC types to understand the full scope of indicators

I have the IOC types summary. There are 3 unique IPs, 2 domains, 2 dropped files, and 1 process created. No registry persistence keys were found. I need to gather detailed network activity to understa

Network activity shows connections to two IPs via HTTPS (443) resolving to Romanian (.ro) and South African (.co.za) domains. No HTTP conversations were captured, suggesting encrypted C2 or data exfil

Two versions of 'updater.exe' were dropped with different SHA256 hashes, suggesting either unpacking or multiple payloads. The file is placed in Temp and AppData/Local/Temp. I need to check registry c

No registry persistence keys were found, which is notable for a 'spreader' type sample. I need to examine process activity to understand API calls, mutexes (RasPbFile was noted in the overview), and m

Process activity shows the use of RASMAN-related modules (rasapi32.dll, rasman.dll) and network modules (wininet.dll, ws2_32.dll). The mutex 'RasPbFile' was noted in the overview but not in this detai
